title: Radar sweep: 60 new papers mapped to the curriculum
items: 60 new papers since the last sweep (RL for LLMs: 29, Agentic RL: 27, Continuous Control: 10, Offline RL: 9, Exploration: 6, Model-Based RL: 3, general: 3, PPO & Policy Gradients: 1, Value Learning: 1)
“MeanFlowNFT: Bringing Forward-Process RL to Average-Velocity Generators” — RL for LLMs
“Mask-Aware Policy Gradients for Diffusion Language Models” — RL for LLMs, PPO & Policy Gradients
“Concept-Guided Spatial Regularization for World Models in Atari Pong” — Agentic RL, Model-Based RL
“Learning in Infinitesimal Non-Compositional Sketches” — RL for LLMs

title: Curriculum expanded: six new chapters, book to frontier
items: Added Ch7 · Continuous Control — DDPG, TD3, and maximum-entropy SAC
Added Ch8 · Model-Based RL & Planning — MCTS, AlphaZero, MuZero, Dreamer world models
Added Ch9 · Exploration & Bandits — regret, UCB, Thompson sampling, curiosity/RND
Added Ch10 · Offline RL & Imitation — behavior cloning, distribution shift, CQL, IQL, decision transformers
Added Ch11 · RL for Language Models — RLHF, DPO, GRPO, and verifiable rewards (RLVR)
Added Ch12 · Agentic RL (capstone) — the agent loop, long-horizon credit assignment, process rewards, reward hacking
Four new projects: SAC on Pendulum, MCTS from scratch, DPO on a small LM, build-your-own agent loop
New levels past π* (Soft Actor-Critic → Agentic Architect) and this Research Radar page with a weekly arXiv sweep
